response.justification: Roughly 14 years of broad full-stack and systems engineering experience across multiple stacks, but the resume shows minimal direct AI/ML work, no evidence of director-level strategic influence, and no recognized AI products or platforms — falling short of a Principal/Director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Broad multi-stack engineering experience across web, mobile, and embedded
Some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Track record of community contribution through talks, workshops, and open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product leadership or recognized AI expertise
Lacks director-level IC scope, strategic advisory, or executive-facing experience
No advanced degree or deep cloud-platform strategy background

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI expertise and recognized AI products
Broad engineering breadth and recent AI-agent exposure
